module.name: Busbar PII Scan
module.blurb: Scan extracted Salesforce datasets for PII and secrets — JSON findings, SARIF, PR comment.
module.longDescription: Detects SSN, email, phone, credit card, DOB, IP, passport, license, bank account, and medical IDs; AWS, Stripe, GitHub, Slack, SendGrid, and Twilio keys; private keys, OAuth tokens, and DB URLs; plus high-entropy strings as a generic secrets net.
